Name: Precision Slash
Description:
Range: 1
Target: One enemy
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue**
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**  
Effect: The target gains **1**$^b$ **Bleed**
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to Fatigue you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b: Increase the Bleed stacks by half your FIN

Name: Pressure Points
Description:
Range: 1
Target: One enemy
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue**
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**  
Effect: The target gains **1**$^b$ **Hamstrung**
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to Fatigue you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b: Increase the Hamstrung stacks by half your FIN

Name: Whirling Slice
Description:
Range: 1
Target: Up to **2**$^b$ enemies within range
Succeed: Deal **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**  
Critical: You may move the target 1 space to an unoccupied space within range
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to the damage you deal on a Success
Upgrade b: The maximum number of targets increases by half your REA

Name: Parry and Riposte
Description:
Range: 1
Trigger: An enemy in range targets you with an attack.
Effect: You may add your Dueling Training Level to your defense roll.
If you do, end this stance. If your contesting roll is a **Critical**,
make a Physical Attack with Finisher against the triggering enemy,
dealing **[1] Fatigue** on a Success.
Upgrade a: Add half your POW to the damage you deal on a Success
Upgrade b: Increase the bonus to your defense roll by an amount equal to half your FIN

Name: Pivot
Description:
Trigger: You or an adjacent character are targeted with an attack
Effect: End this stance and enter any **Basic Stance** of your choice.
If the stance has an effect that shares a trigger with this one,
you may carry it out immediately.
Upgrade a:
If the Stance would normally end after triggering, you may
stay in it or enter a different Basic Stance instead
Upgrade b:
If the Stance grants a Boon to your Defense Roll, gain an
additional Boon for the attack triggering this ability

Name: Press Advantage
Description:
Effect: Your attacks that target an enemy suffering at least one **Status**
are at +**1**$^a$ Boons
Upgrade a: Gain additional Boons equal to half your FIN
Upgrade b:
In addition, when you get a Critical against an enemy with one or more Statuses,
add +1 additional stack. If the target has more than one, add +1 to up to
half your FIN of them

Name: Long Reach
Description: Effect: Your abilities listed as having Range 1 have Range 2 instead
